name: com.shinn.utils
description: A collection of Unity development utilities: helpers, camera controllers, networking (TCP/UDP/Serial), object pooling, an event manager, and editor tools.

samples.description: Upload and download files with Firebase Storage.
HDRP Shader Graph shaders and materials for particle systems.
Core usage samples: ObjectPool, EventManager, TCP/UDP communication, and a language pack.
DOTween tweening helper with a custom editor.
iTween-based tweening helper with path and single-value controllers.
Two-way messaging between a Unity WebGL build and a React host page.
Input System setup with orbit and first-person camera controls.
Load assets (including TextMeshPro) at runtime via Addressables.
Reusable shaders, materials, sprites, and demo prefabs.
